Ready Player One (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $137,690,172Details
International Box Office $445,800,000
Worldwide Box Office $583,490,172
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,689,055
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $24,382,903
Total $31,071,958
Further financial details...

Synopsis

In the year 2045, the real world is a harsh place. The only time Wade Watts truly feels alive is when he escapes to the OASIS, an immersive virtual universe where most of humanity spend their days. In the OASIS, you can go anywhere, do anything—the only limits are your imagination. The OASIS was created by the brilliant and eccentric James Halliday, who left his immense fortune and total control of the OASIS to the winner of a three-part contest he designed to find a worthy heir. When Wade conquers the first challenge of the reality-bending treasure hunt, he and his friends—known as the High Five—are hurled into a fantastical universe of discovery and danger to save the OASIS and their world.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$41,769,050 (30.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.30 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:23.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$150,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,234 opening theaters/4,234 max. theaters, 5.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $180,765,581

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 29th, 2018 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: March 20th, 2018 (Wide), released as Ready Player One (레디 플레이어 원) (South Korea)
March 28th, 2018 (Wide) (France)
March 28th, 2018 (Wide) (Italy)
March 29th, 2018 (Wide) (China)
March 30th, 2018 (Wide) (Netherlands)
Video Release: July 3rd, 2018 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of sci-fi action violence, bloody images, some suggestive material, nudity and language.
(Rating bulletin 2514 (Cert #51421), 2/14/2018)
Running Time: 140 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Motion Capture Performance
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Post-production Conversion, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Environment, Government Corruption, Poverty, Treasure Hunters, Video Game, Virtual Reality
Subgenre: Chase Adventure
Time period setting: Near Future
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Warner Bros., Village Roadshow Productions, Amblin Entertainment, De Line Pictures, Access Entertainment, Dune Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.


  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

In the year 2045, the real world is a harsh place. The only time Wade Watts truly feels alive is when he escapes to the OASIS, an immersive virtual universe where most of humanity spend their days. In the OASIS, you can go anywhere, do anything—the only limits are your imagination. The OASIS was created by the brilliant and eccentric James Halliday, who left his immense fortune and total control of the OASIS to the winner of a three-part contest he designed to find a worthy heir. When Wade conquers the first challenge of the reality-bending treasure hunt, he and his friends—known as the High Five—are hurled into a fantastical universe of discovery and danger to save the OASIS and their world.

Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $180,765,581
